summary: Iteration 2 E2E testing of Smart Workplace. Backend pytest: 47/47 PASS (added 22 new tests for PIN re-check on POST /api/requests, status-transition validation incl. admin bypass, dept-scoped analytics for non-admins, Department PATCH, Visitors CRUD + status transitions, Menu public+CRUD+toggle, Preorders with PIN + status pipeline, IoT command with PIN + listing, Settings GET/PATCH admin-only + persistence). Frontend Playwright: Kiosk /room/123456 renders 3 mode tabs (Request, Order Food, Room Controls) with language & theme toggles; /room/123456/order shows seeded menu items grouped by category with Add-to-cart and 8 add buttons; /room/123456/controls shows 4 device cards (AC, Lights, Projector, Blinds) with on/off/up/down/dim/bright/cool/warm sub-actions and a 'Recent Commands' panel; admin login -> dashboard works with Bearer auth; /admin/departments lists all 6 seeded depts + TEST dept with Edit buttons; /admin/menu renders; /admin/settings shows Slack/Teams/WhatsApp/Email cards with persisted webhook URLs from backend test; /visitors lists TEST visitor with CHECKED OUT status and Check-in Visitor CTA; /orders lists the DELIVERED preorder created by backend test. PWA manifest.json (200) and service-worker.js (200) served at root.

minor.issue: status passed as query param instead of JSON body - inconsistent with PATCH /api/requests/{id}/status and PATCH /api/visitors/{vid}/status which use JSON body. Works but breaks REST convention.
No status-transition validation (any status -> any status allowed); also missing 404 when preorder id doesn't exist (silently no-ops update_one).
Endpoint is fully public with no rate-limiting or captcha - similar concern as POST /api/requests pre-fix. Consider requiring a reception-desk token or host-room PIN.
Public endpoint exposes 'available: false' items as well; kiosk /room/{pin}/order should likely receive only available=true items (frontend currently does not appear to filter).

issues: Theme toggle button on dashboard is missing data-testid='theme-toggle' (kiosk has it but AppShell does not), making automated testing of dark-mode toggle harder.
Clicking 'Add' button increments cart but the cart sidebar badge sometimes did not visually reflect '1 item' on the first add in automated test (could be a state timing issue worth checking).

action_items: (Recommended) Change PATCH /api/preorders/{oid}/status to accept JSON body { status } like the other status endpoints, and add validation + 404 handling.
(Recommended) Add allowed status-transition map for preorders (pending->preparing->out_for_delivery->delivered, plus cancelled).
(Optional) Add data-testid='theme-toggle' on the AppShell theme button to mirror the Kiosk implementation.
(Optional) Filter GET /api/menu publicly to available=true (or add ?available_only=true query) so kiosk order page never shows disabled items.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1210 lines - past the >700 line guideline. Split into routers/auth.py, routers/rooms.py, routers/requests.py, routers/visitors.py, routers/menu_preorders.py, routers/iot.py, routers/settings.py, models.py, seed.py.

STATUS_TRANSITIONS check uses 'if status not in allowed AND user not admin' - correct gating, but the second check 'status not in STATUS_TRANSITIONS' is unreachable because RequestStatusUpdate.status is already Literal-restricted; dead code.

Notification dispatch_notification swallows ALL httpx errors silently with logger.warning - good for resilience, but consider surfacing failures via a failed_dispatches collection so admins know when integrations break in production.
WhatsApp token is masked in GET /api/settings response (good), but slack_webhook_url and teams_webhook_url contain secrets and are returned unmasked - consider masking those too.
PWA service-worker.js is served from /service-worker.js (200) but no cache invalidation strategy / version stamp is visible - on next deploy clients may keep old assets indefinitely.

Public POST /api/preorders and /api/iot/command rely on a single static PIN that doesn't expire - a stolen PIN allows unlimited spam. Consider rate-limiting per room or rotating PINs after N failed attempts.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_smart_workplace.py (added 22 new pytest cases for iteration 2 features and added pin to existing POST /api/requests tests)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (kiosk 3 modes, order, controls, admin pages, visitors, orders, settings, dark mode, PWA all verified)

test_credentials: admin@workplace.com / admin123 (super_admin); reception@workplace.com / demo123; cafeteria@workplace.com / demo123; it@workplace.com / demo123; facilities@workplace.com / demo123; security@workplace.com / demo123; Room PIN 123456 (CEO Cabin).
seed_data_creation: Backend seed seeds 6 departments, 24 categories, 5 rooms, 6 users, 8 menu items, 1 global settings doc. Tests created TEST_ prefixed categories, rooms, departments, menu items, visitor, preorder, request - left in DB and visible in frontend admin pages (acceptable, idempotent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-2 backend + frontend flows verified end-to-end. Run regression: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_smart_workplace.py -v (47 tests, ~10s). New iteration-2 test classes: TestStatusTransitionValidation, TestAnalyticsScoping, TestDepartmentPatch, TestVisitors, TestMenu, TestPreorders, TestIoT, TestSettings. Note PATCH /api/preorders/{oid}/status uses status as QUERY param (?status=preparing), not JSON body - tests use requests.patch(..., params={'status': s}). Public endpoints requiring PIN: POST /api/requests, POST /api/preorders, POST /api/iot/command. Public no-PIN: POST /api/visitors, GET /api/menu, POST /api/rooms/access. Frontend AppShell theme toggle does NOT have data-testid='theme-toggle' (only Kiosk does).
rca of the issue: No bugs blocking the iteration. Minor design recommendations only - see action_items.
